Smartling has successfully implemented its AI Translation Platform for IBM, resulting in a remarkable reduction in localization time by 50%. This partnership allows IBM to efficiently scale its marketing efforts across 170 countries, enhancing its global reach and responsiveness to diverse markets.

The integration of Smartling’s technology highlights a significant trend in the localization industry: the increasing reliance on AI-driven solutions to streamline workflows. By automating translation processes, companies like IBM can not only reduce time-to-market but also maintain consistency and quality in their messaging across multiple languages. This shift is indicative of a broader movement towards optimizing language services through advanced technology.

For localization professionals, this development underscores the importance of adopting AI tools to stay competitive. Embracing such innovations can lead to improved operational efficiency and a stronger ability to meet the demands of an expanding global market.

Source: [news.google.com](https://news.google.?oc=5)
